description: Create a scheduled GitHub Actions workflow named Test: statistical that runs on a cron schedule every Monday to Friday at 21:00. The workflow also accepts manual dispatch. It uses an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy for mode: release, and performs the following steps: checks out omnetpp and inet repositories, sets up ccache, installs dependencies, builds and tests omnetpp and inet, clones inet statistical results, runs statistical tests, and uploads test results as artifacts.
